MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Sauceda.
Gregory Bulliung, Esq. for Plaintiff: Jing X. Ho, not present.
Michael Chambers, Esq., for Defendant: Natalie Naftaliev, present.
Matter settled, terms read into the record as follows: Dismissal in exchange for the waiver.
Trial date vacated.
